name: io.github.birthday-tools/edgarmcp
description: Clean, normalized SEC EDGAR / FRED / ETF / index data for AI agents.

environment_variables.name: EDGAR_USER_AGENT
environment_variables.description: Override the SEC User-Agent contact string

environment_variables.name: FRED_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Free FRED API key for get_macro_series and index levels

environment_variables.name: OPENFIGI_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Optional OpenFIGI key for a higher CUSIP/ISIN rate limit
